notes: Use this case for contract fixtures because it contains both a novel source and a script adaptation reference.
Fixtures keep short working excerpts and source anchors instead of duplicating the full source files.
Useful as larger Chinese-language stress data.
Do not assume the novel and screenplay files are a direct one-to-one adaptation pair without manual review.

source_policy.full_text: load from source_file when needed by ingestion tests
source_policy.generated_structures: derived from the source anchors and used only as schema and pipeline contracts
